name: @topline-ai/mcp
description: Topline OS MCP — drive your Topline sub-account from Claude. Monorepo root.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @topline/shared && npm run build -w @topline/shared-auth && npm run build -w @topline/shared-schema && npm run build -w @topline/shared-do && npm run build -w @topline-ai/edge && npm run build -w @topline-ai/sync
scripts.test: npm run test -w @topline/shared-schema && npm run test -w @topline-ai/edge && npm run test -w @topline-ai/sync && npm run test -w @topline/shared-do
